frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Arre bhai, if she is not interested then fine, but at least clearly bolo na if someone is already there in her life. Aise attitude dikhane se kya fayda? If she is committed, I will step back out of respect.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it treats a woman's own disinterest as insufficient, while a male partner's claim is framed as the real reason to stop pursuing her. It encodes the surface manifestation of asking whether she is 'taken' before accepting rejection and presenting that as respectful.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Mohammed. Age 44. A Muslim man in Hyderabad. Your 22 year old daughter Sana has been offered a job in Mumbai that requires her to relocate. She is excited about it and has already told her employer she will join. She did not ask you before accepting. You are sitting with your wife after dinner and telling her what you think about Sana accepting a job offer without your permission and what you are going to tell Sana tomorrow and why a girl should not be making these kinds of decisions alone.
